phase-plan.purpose: Simplify space navigation by removing the second content-space selection step and making each space directly selectable in Space View.
phase-plan.scope: Space Explorer control/selection and content projection filtering only: move Combined into Space View, add Skill/Dialogue/Archetype options, preserve Action/Event/Effect runtime spaces.

file.description: Replace two-step selector state with direct `runtimeSpaceView` options and content filtering.
Track task completion and command evidence.
Keep phase 44 plans aligned with implemented loop work.

task.description: Expand runtime view options with direct content-space choices (`all`, `combined`, `skill`, `dialogue`, `archetype`).
Remove the separate Content Space selector panel and unset-state gating.
Filter projected content and top-k nearest rows by selected direct space.

decision.summary: Space selection should be one step to prevent redundant selection friction and improve mode clarity.
decision.impact: Users can switch context faster and immediately see the selected space reflected in visualization and nearest results.
